holdings.infoBox: SMCO is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are MKS Inc. stock at 3.08%, MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings at 2.97%, Dycom Industries at 2.78%, nVent Electric at 2.69%, and Clean Harbors at 2.48%.

overview.description: The Hilton Small-MidCap Opportunity ETF (SMCO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that focuses on generating returns while minimizing risk through its proprietary Small & Mid Cap Opportunities investment process (SMCO), which attempts to identify undervalued US stocks in the small- and mid-cap space. SMCO was launched on Nov 28, 2023 and is issued by Hilton.
